notes: vLLM runtime capabilities are backend facts, not repository implementations.
Measured server policy must use OpenAI-compatible measured baselines for deployment selection.
Phase 1 runtime config is single-GPU only: tensor_parallel_size=1 and pipeline_parallel_size=1.
Prefix cache and chunked prefill are backend capabilities here, not measured speedup claims.
Kernel providers are declared in profiles/kernels; vLLM backend profile references them but does not claim this repo implements them.
Inference backend profile: describes a model execution backend, not a hardware platform.
